SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter

Class ApigeeToOpenApiConverter

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
public class ApigeeToOpenApiConverter extends Object
Main entry point for converting Apigee API proxy bundles to OpenAPI 3.0 specifications.

Usage Examples

Basic conversion from a directory:


 ApigeeToOpenApiConverter converter = new ApigeeToOpenApiConverter();
 ConversionResult result = converter.convert(Path.of("./my-proxy"));
 String yaml = result.getOpenAPI();

Conversion from a ZIP file with custom options:


 ConversionOptions options = ConversionOptions.builder()
     .title("My API")
     .version("2.0.0")
     .outputFormat(OutputFormat.YAML)
     .serverUrl("https://api.example.com/v2")
     .build();
     
 ConversionResult result = converter.convert(Path.of("./my-proxy.zip"), options);

Direct conversion to string:


 String openApiYaml = converter.convertToString(
     Path.of("./my-proxy"), 
     OutputFormat.YAML
 );

Conversion and save to file:


 converter.convertAndSave(
     Path.of("./my-proxy"),
     Path.of("./openapi.yaml"),
     ConversionOptions.defaults()
 );

  • Constructor Details

    • ApigeeToOpenApiConverter

      public ApigeeToOpenApiConverter()
      Creates a new converter instance.

  • Method Details

    • convert

      public ConversionResult convert(Path bundlePath) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with default options.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle (ZIP file or directory)
      Returns:
      Conversion result containing the OpenAPI specification
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if conversion fails

    • convert

      public ConversionResult convert(Path bundlePath, ConversionOptions options) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with custom options.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle (ZIP file or directory)
      options - Conversion options
      Returns:
      Conversion result containing the OpenAPI specification
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if conversion fails

    • convertToString

      public String convertToString(Path bundlePath, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Converts an Apigee bundle and returns the OpenAPI spec as a string.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle
      format - Output format (JSON or YAML)
      Returns:
      OpenAPI specification as a string
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if conversion fails

    • convertAndSave

      public ConversionResult convertAndSave(Path bundlePath, Path outputPath, ConversionOptions options) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle
      outputPath - Path for the output file
      options - Conversion options
      Returns:
      Conversion result
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if conversion or writing fails

    • convertAndSave

      public ConversionResult convertAndSave(Path bundlePath, Path outputPath) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file, inferring format from extension.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle
      outputPath - Path for the output file
      Returns:
      Conversion result
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if conversion or writing fails

    • parseBundle

      public ApigeeBundle parseBundle(Path bundlePath) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Parses an Apigee bundle without generating OpenAPI spec. Useful for inspection or custom processing.
      Parameters:
      bundlePath - Path to the bundle
      Returns:
      Parsed ApigeeBundle
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if parsing fails

    • generateOpenApi

      public io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI generateOpenApi(ApigeeBundle bundle, ConversionOptions options)
      Generates OpenAPI spec from an already-parsed bundle. Useful when you want to parse once and generate multiple specs.
      Parameters:
      bundle - The parsed bundle
      options - Conversion options
      Returns:
      Generated OpenAPI specification

    • writeToString

      public String writeToString(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI openAPI, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Writes an OpenAPI specification to a string.
      Parameters:
      openAPI - The OpenAPI specification
      format - Output format
      Returns:
      Serialized specification
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if writing fails

    • writeToFile

      public void writeToFile(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.OpenAPI openAPI, Path path, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat format) throws ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException
      Writes an OpenAPI specification to a file.
      Parameters:
      openAPI - The OpenAPI specification
      path - Output file path
      format - Output format
      Throws:
      ApigeeToOpenApiConverter.ConversionException - if writing fails
